_synthetic_data_notice: All names, companies, and details in this file are entirely fictional. Created for the BriefingClaw demo at GACEP Spring 2026. Not real customer data.

open_opportunities.name: Apex Hybrid Cloud Expansion — Trading Platform
open_opportunities.notes: Expanding OpenShift footprint for real-time trading platform modernization. Tied to contract renewal. Competitor Azure actively pitching — at risk.

open_opportunities.name: Apex Security Automation — SOC Modernization
open_opportunities.notes: CISO Karen Wu exploring Ansible for security orchestration and automated compliance. Early stage but strong internal champion in security org.

recent_support_escalations.summary: OpenShift migration failure — core banking workloads failed to migrate from legacy VMware environment. Rollback required after 6 hours of downtime in staging.
recent_support_escalations.satisfaction: Negative — executive escalation from David Park. Root cause: insufficient pre-migration assessment for stateful workloads. David quoted as saying 'This set us back three months.'

recent_support_escalations.summary: Ansible Automation Platform — playbook performance degradation in large-scale financial compliance scans
recent_support_escalations.satisfaction: Neutral — resolved but took longer than expected (11 days)

contacts.name: David Park
contacts.title: SVP Technology
contacts.preferred_communication: Phone, then in-person. Does not respond well to long emails.
contacts.notes: Pragmatic decision-maker. Former Wall Street infrastructure lead. Intensely focused on uptime and reliability. Currently frustrated with failed migration — needs confidence rebuild. Competitor Azure presenting to Apex board next week.

contacts.name: Karen Wu
contacts.title: CISO
contacts.notes: Strong interest in security automation. Less affected by migration failure — sees separate value in Ansible for SOC. Potential independent champion in security org.

contacts.name: Marcus Thompson
contacts.title: VP Core Banking Engineering
contacts.notes: His team was most impacted by the failed migration. Currently skeptical. Key person to win back for renewal.

open_opportunities.name: TerraScale Platform Expansion — Grid Modernization
open_opportunities.notes: Major platform expansion for smart grid analytics and real-time energy management. Rachel Morrison championing internally. Board presentation scheduled for May 2026 — she wants our help with ROI data.

open_opportunities.name: TerraScale Edge — Remote Substations
open_opportunities.notes: Edge computing for 200+ remote substations. Tied to grid modernization initiative. Requires ruggedized deployment model.

recent_support_escalations.summary: Production outage — OpenShift cluster hosting energy trading platform went down for 4 hours. Impact: real-time energy trading halted, estimated revenue impact $2.3M. Root cause investigation ongoing — suspected etcd quorum loss during routine certificate rotation.
recent_support_escalations.satisfaction: Negative — Rachel Morrison escalated directly to Elena Vasquez. Trust at risk. Rachel quoted: 'I've been your biggest advocate internally, and this makes me look bad.'

recent_support_escalations.summary: Advanced Cluster Management — policy sync delay across 12 clusters in field operations
recent_support_escalations.satisfaction: Positive — resolved in 2 days, customer satisfied with communication

contacts.name: Rachel Morrison
contacts.title: Chief Technology Officer
contacts.preferred_communication: In-person preferred, then video call. Engages deeply — schedule 90 minutes minimum for any meeting.
contacts.notes: Champion-level advocate. Former open source contributor (Apache Kafka committer). Deeply technical CTO who codes on weekends. Drives platform decisions personally. Currently stressed about P1 outage ahead of board presentation. Needs confidence that we are treating the RCA with urgency.

contacts.name: Anil Desai
contacts.title: VP Platform Engineering
contacts.notes: Rachel's right hand on platform strategy. Running the RCA internally on TerraScale side. Technically rigorous — needs root cause detail, not platitudes.

contacts.name: Lisa Chang
contacts.title: VP Grid Technology
contacts.notes: Owns the grid modernization business case. Attended last CAB as Rachel's guest to observe. Key stakeholder for the $5M deal.

contacts.name: Frank Reeves
contacts.title: CISO
contacts.notes: Involved in P1 post-mortem from security perspective. Concerned about certificate management process that may have contributed to outage. Not yet engaged in broader platform conversation — opportunity.

open_opportunities.name: SnackStack Platform Scaling — TikTok Viral Load
open_opportunities.notes: AI recipe engine went viral on TikTok — 40x traffic spike crashed production. Urgent need for platform auto-scaling and multi-region deployment. Pepper Minton personally championing.

open_opportunities.name: SnackStack AI Expansion — Flavor Profile Engine
open_opportunities.notes: Next-gen AI model for personalized flavor recommendations. Requires GPU-accelerated inference at scale on OpenShift AI.

recent_support_escalations.summary: Production outage — OpenShift cluster overwhelmed by TikTok-driven traffic surge. Recipe recommendation API returned 503 errors for 2.5 hours during peak. Auto-scaling limits hit. Revenue impact estimated at $180K in lost ad impressions.
recent_support_escalations.satisfaction: Mixed — resolved quickly but Pepper wants a scalability architecture review to prevent recurrence

recent_support_escalations.summary: AMQ Streams — Kafka consumer lag in event processing pipeline during high-traffic periods
recent_support_escalations.satisfaction: Neutral — team is working through it collaboratively

contacts.name: Pepper Minton
contacts.title: Chief Technology Officer
contacts.preferred_communication: Slack first, then video call. Hates email threads longer than 3 messages.
contacts.notes: High-energy CTO. Built SnackStack's original recipe engine as a weekend hackathon project. Loves standing meetings, tacos, and oat milk lattes. Hates PowerPoint — insists on live demos or whiteboard sessions. Currently focused on scaling after unexpected viral growth.

contacts.name: Riley Forks
contacts.title: VP Engineering
contacts.notes: Pepper's right hand on infrastructure decisions. Former SRE at a major cloud provider. Focused on reliability and cost optimization.

open_opportunities.name: Quantum Pretzel Platform Renewal + Expansion
open_opportunities.notes: Contract renewal with proposed expansion. At risk — Ziggy Stardust-Chen stepped down from CAB in Q4 2025 and competitor AWS is aggressively pitching EKS migration. Renewal is the immediate priority.

recent_support_escalations.summary: Advanced Cluster Security — false positive alerts flooding the SOC during crypto transaction peaks. Alert tuning request escalated after 3 weeks without resolution.
recent_support_escalations.satisfaction: Negative — Ziggy cited this as an example of feeling deprioritized. Resolution took too long.

recent_support_escalations.summary: OpenShift — pod scheduling latency spikes during high-frequency trading workloads
recent_support_escalations.satisfaction: Neutral — resolved but required multiple follow-ups

contacts.name: Ziggy Stardust-Chen
contacts.title: VP Platform Engineering

contacts.preferred_communication: Video call only — no meetings before noon (night owl). Allergic to corporate jargon — be direct and technical.
contacts.notes: Remote-first advocate. Former CAB member who left feeling ignored. Competitor AWS is actively courting with EKS migration offer. Contract renewal in 2 months. Wants to feel valued — re-engagement is possible but requires genuine effort, not a sales pitch.

contacts.name: Kai Nakamura
contacts.title: Director Infrastructure
contacts.notes: Still technically favorable toward OpenShift but frustrated by support response times. Key person to retain for renewal.

contacts.name: Luna Wavelength
contacts.title: Chief Innovation Officer
contacts.preferred_communication: In-person or video call. Loves whiteboards. Tests everything hands-on — always have a lab environment ready.
contacts.notes: Former NASA engineer. Vegetarian. Drinks earl grey tea. Deeply technical leader who personally evaluates technology. Strong champion but currently blocked by CISO Colonel Drake on expansion. Needs help building the security compliance case to unblock the $8M deal.

contacts.title: CISO
contacts.notes: Former military cybersecurity. Extremely risk-averse. Blocking expansion until all NIST 800-171 findings are remediated. Not opposed to the technology — opposed to moving fast without compliance assurance. Needs a dedicated security engagement.
